zh.Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, England: 英國格盧斯特斯爾布利普斯費爾德
zh.Northampton, England: 英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Walter Giffard of Boyton於大約1152年出生在英國英格蘭維爾爾時，他的父親Elias Giffard  II, Lord of Brimpsfield53歲，母親Berthe fitzPons47歲。他和Lady Walter Giffard of Boyton至少有1個兒子。他去世於1185年12月在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾享年34歲。

zh-hans.Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, England: 英国格盧斯特斯爾布利普斯費爾德
zh-hans.Northampton, England: 英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Walter Giffard of Boyton于大约1152年出生在英国英格兰維爾爾时，他的父亲Elias Giffard  II, Lord of Brimpsfield53岁，母亲Berthe fitzPons47岁。他和Lady Walter Giffard of Boyton至少有1个儿子。他去世于1185年12月在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾享年34岁。

nameMeanings.name: Giffard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: (i) relationship name from the Continental Germanic personal name Gifard. (ii) nickname, perhaps sometimes from Old French giffard ‘chubby-cheeked, bloated’.

variants.name: Jeffords
meanings: English: variant of Gifford , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Guiver
meanings: English: (i) nickname, apparently from Middle English giver ‘giver, donor, bestower’. (ii) variant of Giffard with voicing of /f/ to /v/ and loss of final -d.

variants.name: Gafford
meanings: English (southeastern): assimilated form of Gatford, a name of various origins. In Sussex and Surrey it is perhaps a variant of the habitational name Catford from a place so called in Somerset. Gatford is also from the habitational names Gateford (in Worksop, Nottinghamshire) or Gateforth (near Selby, Yorkshire), both formed with Old English gāt ‘goat’ + ford ‘ford’, influenced by Old Norse geit ‘goat’.

Probably also an altered form of German Gaffert: habitational name from Gaffert near Köslin, Brandenburg, or from a personal name formed with Middle High German gate ‘fellow, companion’. The surname Gaffert is very rare in Germany.

English: perhaps an altered form of Gatewood , an occupational name for a ‘goatherd’ (Middle English gate-werde, Old English gātweard) or for a ‘gate keeper’ (Middle English gateward, Old English ʒeatweard, dialect gātward).

variants.name: Gifford
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Giffard, either from the Middle English personal name Gifard, derived from an Old French name of this form deriving from ancient Germanic geb- ‘give, gift’ + hard- ‘hardy, brave’, or perhaps sometimes a nickname from Old French gif(f)ard ‘chubby-cheeked, bloated’.

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Walter Giffard of Boyton was born about 1152, in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Elias Giffard  II, Lord of Brimpsfield, was 53 and his mother, Berthe fitzPons, was 47. He had at least 1 son with Lady Walter Giffard of Boyton. He died in December 1185, in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 34.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Walter Giffard of Boyton est né environ 1152, à Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Elias Giffard  II, Lord of Brimpsfield, avait 53 ans et sa mère, Berthe fitzPons, avait 47 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Lady Walter Giffard of Boyton. Il est décédé en décembre 1185, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 34 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Walter Giffard of Boyton um 1152 in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Elias Giffard  II, Lord of Brimpsfield 53 und seine Mutter Berthe fitzPons 47. Er hatte mit Lady Walter Giffard of Boyton mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb im Dezember 1185 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Walter Giffard of Boyton è nato il circa 1152 nel Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Elias Giffard  II, Lord of Brimpsfield, aveva 53 anni e il suo madre, Berthe fitzPons, aveva 47 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Lady Walter Giffard of Boyton. Morì nel dicembre 1185, nel Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 34 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Walter Giffard of Boytonが約1152年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアで生まれた時，父Elias Giffard  II, Lord of Brimpsfieldは53歳，母Berthe fitzPonsは47歳であった。彼はLady Walter Giffard of Boytonとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1185年12月にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアで34歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Walter Giffard of Boyton(이)가 대략 1152년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Elias Giffard  II, Lord of Brimpsfield(은)는 53세였고, 그의 어머니 Berthe fitzPons(은)는 47세였다. 그는 Lady Walter Giffard of Boyton(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1185년 12월 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르에서 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Northampton, England: North Hamtunscire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Walter Giffard of Boyton nasceu aproximadamente 1152, em Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Elias Giffard  II, Lord of Brimpsfield, tinha 53 anos e sua mãe, Berthe fitzPons, tinha 47 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Lady Walter Giffard of Boyton. Ele faleceu em dezembro de 1185, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 34 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Walter Giffard of Boyton родился около 1152 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Elias Giffard  II, Lord of Brimpsfield было 53 года, а матери, которую звали Berthe fitzPons, 47. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Lady Walter Giffard of Boyton. Он умер декабрь 1185 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 34 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Walter Giffard of Boyton nació aproximadamente 1152, en Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Elias Giffard  II, Lord of Brimpsfield, tenía 53 años y su mamá, Berthe fitzPons, tenía 47 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Lady Walter Giffard of Boyton. Murió en diciembre de 1185, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 34 años.
